verses.text: I hear the Savior say, "Your strength indeed is small, child of weakness, watch and pray, find in me your all in all." Jesus paid it all, all to him I owe; sin had left a crimson stain, he washed it white as snow. Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018, used by permission

Lord, now indeed I find your pow'r and yours alone, can change the leper's spots and melt the heart of stone. Jesus paid it all, all to him I owe; sin had left a crimson stain, he washed it white as snow. Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018, used by permission

For nothing good have I whereby your grace to claim-- I'll wash my garments white in the blood of Calv'ry's Lamb. Jesus paid it all, all to him I owe; sin had left a crimson stain, he washed it white as snow. Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018, used by permission

And when, before the throne, I stand in him complete, "Jesus died my soul to save," my lips shall still repeat. Jesus paid it all, all to him I owe; sin had left a crimson stain, he washed it white as snow. Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018, used by permission
